## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
# Minimal command or code to reproduce the issue
python run_sattc_loso.py ...
```

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened. Include the full traceback if applicable.

```
Paste traceback here
```

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Python | e.g. 3.10.12 |
| PyTorch | e.g. 2.1.0+cu118 |
| GPU | e.g. NVIDIA A100 |
| SATTC version / commit | e.g. `git rev-parse HEAD` output |

## Additional Context
Any other context, logs, or screenshots.
